ai_disclosure.body: Quarrel is an AI system. The replies you receive are generated by a language model, not written by a human. They can be wrong, biased, or contradictory. They are not medical, legal, financial, or mental-health advice. If you are in crisis, contact your local emergency services or one of the hotlines under Safety.
ai_disclosure.title: You are talking to an AI.

app.name: Quarrel
app.tagline: The AI that won't let you lie to yourself.

cookie_banner.body: Quarrel uses only the cookies needed to sign you in, protect forms, and remember your language. Analytics are cookieless.

couples_invite.body: Tap to accept the Quarrel couples link.
couples_invite.title: {partner_name} wants to argue with you (in a healthy way).

eulogy_ready.body: Open it when you're ready to be honest.
eulogy_ready.title: Your Q{quarter} eulogy is ready.

wager_failed.body: Open the app to see the receipt.
wager_failed.title: You lost. ${stake} going to {anti_charity}.
